  • Method Details

    • accountId

      public BasketOrder.Builder accountId(String accountId)
      The identifier of the account transacting this order

    • accountId

      public BasketOrder.Builder accountId(Optional<String> accountId)
      The identifier of the account transacting this order

    • assetId

      public BasketOrder.Builder assetId(String assetId)
      Apex Asset ID for this asset. This will not be returned in the initial CreateOrder response and will be available after an order completes validation. If the provided identifier does not match any Apex asset available for trading, an OrderRejectReason of "UNKNOWN_SECURITY" will be returned and the asset_id will not be set.

    • assetId

      public BasketOrder.Builder assetId(Optional<String> assetId)
      Apex Asset ID for this asset. This will not be returned in the initial CreateOrder response and will be available after an order completes validation. If the provided identifier does not match any Apex asset available for trading, an OrderRejectReason of "UNKNOWN_SECURITY" will be returned and the asset_id will not be set.

    • assetType

      public BasketOrder.Builder assetType(BasketOrderAssetType assetType)
      The type of the asset in this order

    • assetType

      public BasketOrder.Builder assetType(Optional<? extends BasketOrderAssetType> assetType)
      The type of the asset in this order

    • averagePrices

      public BasketOrder.Builder averagePrices(List<BasketTradingExecutedPrice> averagePrices)
      The average prices, as weighted averages, across all executions in this order. Will be absent if an order has no executions.

      When asset_type = EQUITY, there will be at most one value present, with a type of PRICE_PER_UNIT. This will have up to 4 decimal places for USD amounts less than $1, and a maximum of two for larger USD amounts.

    • averagePrices

      public BasketOrder.Builder averagePrices(Optional<? extends List<BasketTradingExecutedPrice>> averagePrices)
      The average prices, as weighted averages, across all executions in this order. Will be absent if an order has no executions.

      When asset_type = EQUITY, there will be at most one value present, with a type of PRICE_PER_UNIT. This will have up to 4 decimal places for USD amounts less than $1, and a maximum of two for larger USD amounts.

    • basketOrderId

      public BasketOrder.Builder basketOrderId(String basketOrderId)
      System generated unique id for the basket order.

    • basketOrderId

      public BasketOrder.Builder basketOrderId(Optional<String> basketOrderId)
      System generated unique id for the basket order.

    • clientOrderId

      public BasketOrder.Builder clientOrderId(String clientOrderId)
      User-supplied unique order ID. Cannot be more than 40 characters long.

    • clientOrderId

      public BasketOrder.Builder clientOrderId(Optional<String> clientOrderId)
      User-supplied unique order ID. Cannot be more than 40 characters long.

    • clientOrderReceivedTime

      public BasketOrder.Builder clientOrderReceivedTime(OffsetDateTime clientOrderReceivedTime)
      Time the order request was received by the client. Must be in the past.

    • clientOrderReceivedTime

      public BasketOrder.Builder clientOrderReceivedTime(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<OffsetDateTime> clientOrderReceivedTime)
      Time the order request was received by the client. Must be in the past.

    • createTime

      public BasketOrder.Builder createTime(OffsetDateTime createTime)
      Time of the order creation

    • createTime

      public BasketOrder.Builder createTime(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<OffsetDateTime> createTime)
      Time of the order creation

    • cumulativeNotionalValue

      public BasketOrder.Builder cumulativeNotionalValue(BasketOrderCumulativeNotionalValue cumulativeNotionalValue)
      The product of order quantity & price, summed across all fills, reported in the currency specified in the order. (This will be rounded to 2 decimal places for USD currencies). Will be absent if an order has no fill information.

    • cumulativeNotionalValue

      public BasketOrder.Builder cumulativeNotionalValue(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends BasketOrderCumulativeNotionalValue> cumulativeNotionalValue)
      The product of order quantity & price, summed across all fills, reported in the currency specified in the order. (This will be rounded to 2 decimal places for USD currencies). Will be absent if an order has no fill information.

    • currencyCode

      public BasketOrder.Builder currencyCode(String currencyCode)
      Defaults to "USD". Only "USD" is supported. Full list of currency codes is defined at: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217

    • currencyCode

      public BasketOrder.Builder currencyCode(Optional<String> currencyCode)
      Defaults to "USD". Only "USD" is supported. Full list of currency codes is defined at: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217

    • executions

      public BasketOrder.Builder executions(List<BasketTradingExecutions> executions)
      The execution-level details that compose this order

    • executions

      public BasketOrder.Builder executions(Optional<? extends List<BasketTradingExecutions>> executions)
      The execution-level details that compose this order

    • filledQuantity

      public BasketOrder.Builder filledQuantity(BasketOrderFilledQuantity filledQuantity)
      The summed quantity value across all fills in this order, up to a maximum of 5 decimal places. Will be absent if an order has no fill information.

    • filledQuantity

      public BasketOrder.Builder filledQuantity(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends BasketOrderFilledQuantity> filledQuantity)
      The summed quantity value across all fills in this order, up to a maximum of 5 decimal places. Will be absent if an order has no fill information.

    • identifier

      public BasketOrder.Builder identifier(String identifier)
      Identifier of the asset (of the type specified in `identifier_type`).

    • identifier

      public BasketOrder.Builder identifier(Optional<String> identifier)
      Identifier of the asset (of the type specified in `identifier_type`).

    • identifierType

      public BasketOrder.Builder identifierType(BasketOrderIdentifierType identifierType)
      The identifier type of the asset being ordered. For Equities: only SYMBOL is supported For Mutual Funds: only SYMBOL and CUSIP are supported

    • identifierType

      public BasketOrder.Builder identifierType(Optional<? extends BasketOrderIdentifierType> identifierType)
      The identifier type of the asset being ordered. For Equities: only SYMBOL is supported For Mutual Funds: only SYMBOL and CUSIP are supported

    • lastUpdateTime

      public BasketOrder.Builder lastUpdateTime(OffsetDateTime lastUpdateTime)
      Time of the last order update

    • lastUpdateTime

      public BasketOrder.Builder lastUpdateTime(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<OffsetDateTime> lastUpdateTime)
      Time of the last order update

    • maxSellQuantity

      public BasketOrder.Builder maxSellQuantity(BasketOrderMaxSellQuantity maxSellQuantity)
      The maximum number of shares to be sold if this is a notional SELL order of an Equity asset type. (Prohibited for other side or asset_type inputs.)

      This will only be recognized for clients configured to bypass the short sale risk check. When specified, must be greater than 0 and can't exceed 5 decimal places.

    • maxSellQuantity

      public BasketOrder.Builder maxSellQuantity(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends BasketOrderMaxSellQuantity> maxSellQuantity)
      The maximum number of shares to be sold if this is a notional SELL order of an Equity asset type. (Prohibited for other side or asset_type inputs.)

      This will only be recognized for clients configured to bypass the short sale risk check. When specified, must be greater than 0 and can't exceed 5 decimal places.

    • name

      public BasketOrder.Builder name(String name)
      System generated name of the basket order.

    • name

      public BasketOrder.Builder name(Optional<String> name)
      System generated name of the basket order.

    • notionalValue

      public BasketOrder.Builder notionalValue(BasketOrderNotionalValue notionalValue)
      Notional quantity of the order, measured in USD. Maximum 2 decimal place precision. Either a quantity or notional_value MUST be specified (but not both). For Equities: currently not supported yet For Mutual Funds: Only supported for BUY orders. The order will be transacted at the full notional amount specified.

    • notionalValue

      public BasketOrder.Builder notionalValue(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends BasketOrderNotionalValue> notionalValue)
      Notional quantity of the order, measured in USD. Maximum 2 decimal place precision. Either a quantity or notional_value MUST be specified (but not both). For Equities: currently not supported yet For Mutual Funds: Only supported for BUY orders. The order will be transacted at the full notional amount specified.

    • orderRejectedReason

      public BasketOrder.Builder orderRejectedReason(BasketOrderOrderRejectedReason orderRejectedReason)
      When an order has the REJECTED status, this will be populated with a system code describing the rejection.

    • orderRejectedReason

      public BasketOrder.Builder orderRejectedReason(Optional<? extends BasketOrderOrderRejectedReason> orderRejectedReason)
      When an order has the REJECTED status, this will be populated with a system code describing the rejection.

    • orderStatus

      public BasketOrder.Builder orderStatus(BasketOrderOrderStatus orderStatus)
      The processing status of the order

    • orderStatus

      public BasketOrder.Builder orderStatus(Optional<? extends BasketOrderOrderStatus> orderStatus)
      The processing status of the order

    • orderType

      public BasketOrder.Builder orderType(BasketOrderOrderType orderType)
      The execution type of this order.

    • orderType

      public BasketOrder.Builder orderType(Optional<? extends BasketOrderOrderType> orderType)
      The execution type of this order.

    • quantity

      public BasketOrder.Builder quantity(BasketOrderQuantity quantity)
      Numeric quantity of the order. Either a quantity or notional_value MUST be specified (but not both). For Equities: Represents the number of shares, must be greater than zero and may not exceed 5 decimal places. For Mutual Funds: Only supported for SELL orders. Represents the number of shares, up to a maximum of 3 decimal places.

    • quantity

      public BasketOrder.Builder quantity(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends BasketOrderQuantity> quantity)
      Numeric quantity of the order. Either a quantity or notional_value MUST be specified (but not both). For Equities: Represents the number of shares, must be greater than zero and may not exceed 5 decimal places. For Mutual Funds: Only supported for SELL orders. Represents the number of shares, up to a maximum of 3 decimal places.

    • side

      public BasketOrder.Builder side(BasketOrderSide side)
      The side of this order.

    • side

      public BasketOrder.Builder side(Optional<? extends BasketOrderSide> side)
      The side of this order.

    • specialReportingInstructions

      public BasketOrder.Builder specialReportingInstructions(List<BasketOrderSpecialReportingInstructions> specialReportingInstructions)
      Special Reporting Instructions to be applied to this order. Can include multiple Instructions.

    • specialReportingInstructions

      public BasketOrder.Builder specialReportingInstructions(Optional<? extends List<BasketOrderSpecialReportingInstructions>> specialReportingInstructions)
      Special Reporting Instructions to be applied to this order. Can include multiple Instructions.

    • timeInForce

      public BasketOrder.Builder timeInForce(BasketOrderTimeInForce timeInForce)
      Must be the value "DAY". Regulatory requirements dictate that the system capture the intended time_in_force, which is why this a mandatory field.

    • timeInForce

      public BasketOrder.Builder timeInForce(Optional<? extends BasketOrderTimeInForce> timeInForce)
      Must be the value "DAY". Regulatory requirements dictate that the system capture the intended time_in_force, which is why this a mandatory field.

    • build

      public BasketOrder build()
